Defendant Kevin Chen'S Motion For Protective Order Limiting Discovery
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christina Liang, Esq. of Wong, Chang & Yang, 510-451-2124, appearing for Hong Wang, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Richard Cooc, Esq. of Law Office of Hao T. Cooc, 510-268-8063, appearing for Alice Toy, Defendant and moving party.

ARGUED. ARGUED. Mr. Cooc stated that he contested to the tentative ruling, reported that there was previously a protective order issued and provided case background. Ms. Liang argued that the settlement agreement has been breeched.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Kevin Chen's Motion For Protective Order Limiting Discovery is DENIED. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)
